**Elyra Grove** — a native local development environment in Rust.

### Downloads

- **CLI / daemon** — `grove-<version>-<target>.tar.gz` (contains the `grove` binary; run `grove daemon`, or `grove gui`).
- **macOS app** — `.dmg` (unsigned; right-click → Open on first launch).
- **Linux app** — `.deb` / `.AppImage`.

See the [README](https://github.com/kwhorne/grove#readme) and
[CHANGELOG](https://github.com/kwhorne/grove/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for details.

---
